<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$MDPS$ = DPS * Max Hits
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$MCE$ = Total Price / $MDPS$
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 650; 275; 950; 2400; 4000; 10000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; 0;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Higher Voltage; Improved Handling; Faraday's Vest; Shock Force; Zeus Cannon
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 3280081327; 4675534331; 4675521746; 4675504505; 4675504640
$DREF$ = <ref>Assumes that only one enemy is hit per shock.</ref>
$MREF$ = <ref>Calculated as DPS × Max Hits.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! Chain Range !! Max Hits !! Shock Time !! Defense Melt !! DPS$DREF$ !! Max DPS$MREF$ !! Cost Efficiency !! Max Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 1.35 || 10 || 10 || 2 || 0.1 || 0% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 1.15 || 12 || 10 || 2 || 0.1 || 0% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 1.15 || 13 || 10 || 3 || 0.1 || 0% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 22 || 1.15 || 13 || 10 || 3 || 0.1 || 0% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 70 || 2.5 || 13 || 15 || 4 || 0.15 || 0% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 100 || 2.5 || 15 || 20 || 6 || 0.25 || 20% || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|}
</div>
